info.name: Shri Lakshmi Vigneswara Traders — Inventory API

request.description: Login as admin. Copy the 'token' from the response and paste it into the 'token' collection variable.
Set is_active=0 to disable, 1 to enable.

Returns the next auto-generated product ID for the given category. Examples: seeds -> SEED001, fertilizers -> FERT001, pesticides -> PEST001. The number increments based on existing products with matching prefix.

Valid units: kg, packet, bag, liters

product_id is now auto-generated from the category (e.g. SEED005, FERT003). You can still pass it explicitly if needed.

Valid units: kg, packet, bag, liters

product_id is now auto-generated from the category (e.g. SEED005, FERT003). You can still pass it explicitly if needed.

Create a product with unit = liters (new unit added alongside kg, packet, bag).

product_id is now auto-generated from the category (e.g. SEED005, FERT003). You can still pass it explicitly if needed.
Valid units: kg, packet, bag, liters
Blocked if the product has existing sales records.

Replace the sale_id with a real one from your system.

The receipt_number returned here is also used as the PDF filename when the operator prints the receipt.
Mark a receipt as printed. Note: when printing/saving as PDF from the Receipt page, the browser uses the receipt_number (e.g. R-20260316-rameshkumar-4K) as the default PDF filename.
Blocked if any product currently uses this category.
purchase_date is the user's IST date (YYYY-MM-DD). Backend converts it to UTC for storage.

item.name: Record Purchase (No Date — uses current time)

request.description: Stock is adjusted by (new_quantity - old_quantity). Can be negative to correct over-entries.
Returns total stock, today's sales, low-stock alerts, 7-day revenue chart, and category breakdown.
Returns available inventory, operator's own today's sales, and popular items.
Returns compact KPIs: total products, stock, today/month revenue and transactions.
